title: Standard Crossref Sandbox
text:
1 Sandbox Book
This is a clean Quarto book sandbox using standard theorem environments and standard @id cross-references.
See Theorem 2.1 and Lemma 2.2 in Chapter 1.

title: 2  Chapter One
text:
We can reference a theorem before stating it: Theorem 2.1.

Theorem 2.1 (A Main Theorem) For every real number \(x\), if \(x > 1\) then \(x^2 > 1\).


Lemma 2.2 If \(x > 1\), then \(x^2 > x\).


Theorem 2.3 If \(x > 2\), then \(x^2 > 4\).


Proof. See the pudding.

The proof idea for Theorem 2.1 uses Lemma 2.2, and Theorem 2.3 is another theorem in the same shared counter.

Exercise 2.1 Prove Theorem 2.1 directly from the definition of order on \(\mathbb{R}\).

Now refer back to the exercise: Exercise 2.1.

title: 3  Chapter Two
text:
This chapter references Chapter 1 results: Theorem 2.1, Lemma 2.2, Theorem 2.3, and Exercise 2.1.

Proposition 3.1 A proposition in Chapter Two that references Lemma 2.2.

Cross-reference check: Proposition 3.1.
